MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File Proposed First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DREW TARTALA MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File Proposed First Amended Complaint

Plaintiff's "motion for leave to file proposed first amended complaint" is granted.

"That trial courts are to liberally permit such amendments, at any stage of the proceeding, has been established policy in this state since 1901." (Hirsa v. Sup. Ct. (1981) 118 Cal.App.3d 486, 488-89; see also CCP section 428.50(c).) A proposed amended complaint's validity is not considered when deciding leave to amend. (See Kittredge Sports Co. v. Sup. Ct. (1989) 213 Cal.App.3d 1045, 1048.)

Defendants will suffer some prejudice, but the scheduled trial date is more than six months out, February 26, 2024.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
